name: Ranger
_comment: A woodsman who can use any bow, light armor, and a range of melee weapons. Knows healing magic. Herbalism training makes them adept at finding reagents in the wild. Starting at level 3, Rangers gain rogue-like Pick Locks and Detect Traps abilities.

class_abilities.name: Herbalism
class_abilities.description: Keen knowledge of flora lets Rangers spot reagents in the wild. When the party presses E to examine a tile, each Ranger rolls an INT saving throw (d20 + INT mod vs DC 13) — success identifies a potion reagent.

class_abilities.name: Pick Locks
class_abilities.description: From level 3, a Ranger can pick locked doors and chests (d20 + DEX mod vs DC 12), consuming one lockpick per attempt — same mechanic as a Thief.

class_abilities.name: Detect Traps
class_abilities.description: From level 3, a Ranger's woodcraft reveals hidden traps before the party steps on them.
